gitCommit.subject: test: migrate to native tag API and parametrize checkout validation (#29)
gitCommit.body:
test: migrate to native tag API and parametrize checkout validation (#29)

- Move @-tags from test titles to Playwright's structured `{ tag: [...] }`
  option across auth, shopping, and users specs. Titles read clean while
  tags stay filterable via --grep / --grep-invert (CI token-free path intact).
- Parametrize the three required-field checkout validation tests into a
  data-driven loop; still emitted as independent tests for separate reporting.
- Centralize checkout validation error strings in checkout-data.ts.
- Polish PR template with comment hints and a Type-of-change section.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subs.title: standard user can log in and land on inventory
locked out user sees a clear login error
unauthenticated user cannot deep-link into inventory
user can add and remove an item from the cart
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="cart-list"] [data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove' })
user can complete checkout for selected products
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Bike Light' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
user can sort products by price from low to high
